It's got some of these guys are still at five bucks a day or whatever So we have that going for us and it hasn't had to kick in yet because we haven't spent enough We also have right over here this other thing which is okay if we've spent more Then 20 bucks excluding today and it hasn't made at least 1.1% return on investment then let's decrease our ad set budget Right and it's decreasing it by 5% and we're gonna check that every day at midnight So this hasn't run yet either, but if we look okay We're just now getting over the $20 threshold with these guys and when do you think that happened it happened today? Right or whatever the threshold was I think it's 20 bucks it happened today So it like it'll run at midnight and it's probably gonna pause those other ads which is fine You know, I don't want to be running stuff if it's not getting me sales at the at the at the cost There were the return on ad spend that I want you know, I can make a decision later But I want to always have those stop gaps I'd rather it cut something off and I can turn it back on and let something run and cause me to lose money All right, so that's rule number one rule number two over here is that hey, it's going to check all right? So here we find this rule for you There we go If it's going to check every three hours is like okay for today If our if our return on ad spend today is over 1.5 percent Then we're going to increase that budget by 5 and it's done that a couple of times right We can tell over here because look this the bids here are going up a little bit For some of these guys now, you know, they have They haven't continued to stay profitable So there were days where these guys were profitable and it scaled up But it hasn't been scaling anymore because they're not currently profitable and this is okay You know, I mean this isn't going to kill us like this is fine.
